case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ANDREA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-12-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH (SR. COLLECTION OFFICER). DEFENDANT ANDREA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES INFORM THE COURT THAT THEY HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING AND REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR 5 MONTHS TO MONITOR THE STATUS OF SETTLEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR A TRIAL ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO NOV-16-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS (SR. COLLECTION OFFICER). DEFENDANT ANDREA HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS NOT BEEN SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED AND PLAINTIFF WISHES TO NOW PROCEED WITH A TRIAL ON ITS CLAIM. AS THE COURT'S 5/11/23 ORDER DID NOT INSTRUCT THE PARTIES TO APPEAR TODAY FOR TRIAL AND SINCE THE DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT TODAY, THE COURT CONTINUES THIS CASE TO 12/18/23 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506 FOR A TRIAL ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED FEB-08-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANDREA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-14-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT ANDREA HERNANDEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108)RE: ERROR IN JUDGMENT COSTS - SUBMITTED THREE(2) DAYS PASS 30 DAY TIME LIMIT (REQUEST FORWARDED [ON 1/30/24] TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANDREA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANDREA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
